nodes.label: Backend Models
nodes.summary: Mongoose data models layer within the backend, child of the backend component.

nodes.label: Backend Controllers
nodes.summary: HTTP request/response handler layer with 23 controllers covering user, auth, period, section, checkin, insight, payment, enrollment, notification, ranking, admin, audit, backup, wechat, and tenant domains.

nodes.label: Backend Routes
nodes.summary: Express routing layer defining all API endpoints (auth, user, period, section, checkin, insight, payment, enrollment, notification, ranking, admin, audit, backup, wechat, etc.) with auth and tenant middleware.

nodes.label: Backend Services
nodes.summary: Business logic layer encapsulating payment, backup, sync, subscribe messages, study reminders, period status, community access, WeChat API calls, and cron jobs.

nodes.label: External Services
nodes.summary: External service boundary for WeChat platform APIs, WeChat Pay, Socket.IO clients, browser clients, and email/notification dependencies reached from backend/src/services/ and miniprogram wx APIs.

nodes.label: WeChat Pay
nodes.summary: WeChat Pay unified-order and callback boundary used by payment.service.js and payment.controller.js to create prepay parameters and accept payment callbacks.

nodes.label: Subscribe Messages
nodes.summary: WeChat subscribe-message delivery API used by subscribe-message.service.js and reminder schedules, tracking grants and delivery attempts in MongoDB.

nodes.label: WeChat Login
nodes.summary: WeChat login endpoint used by wechat.service.js to exchange wx.login codes for openid, session_key, and unionid; mocked in dev/test environments.

nodes.label: Socket Clients
nodes.summary: Realtime client boundary for Socket.IO/WebSocket updates; backend maps user IDs to socket connections in websocket.js, miniprogram manages client-side connect/reconnect/dispatch.

nodes.label: WeChat JSSDK
nodes.summary: WeChat access-token and JSAPI-ticket endpoints used by wechat-jssdk.service.js to create signatures for webview or H5 WeChat features.

nodes.label: MongoDB
nodes.summary: Primary database storing all business data (users, periods, checkins, insights, payments) with multi-tenant isolation via tenantId field injected by Mongoose plugin.

nodes.label: MySQL
nodes.summary: Auxiliary database for data sync and backup, receiving async data from MongoDB via Redis queue to support analytics and cross-system integration.

syncs data to asynchronously via Redis queue
is source for async sync to
